title: رفع قطعی Too many subrequests در Cron و ربات مرکزی
summary: وظایف سنگین Core در هشت چرخه مستقل تقسیم شدند و در صورت اتمام بودجه درخواست Core، پیام تلگرام و هشدار فوری از Invocation مستقل Processor ارسال می‌شود؛ بنابراین بروزرسانی، Processor و پاسخ ربات دیگر بودجه یکدیگر را مصرف نمی‌کنند.
features: splits Core scheduled maintenance into eight isolated phases
runs automatic update before any other external network task in its own phase
moves Telegram delivery to a fresh Processor invocation when Core hits the subrequest limit
keeps immediate central error alerts deliverable even when the failing Core invocation has no external-request budget left
reduces routine menu, manager, payment and report flush batch sizes
automatically resolves the open automatic-update and Processor-trigger limit errors after successful cycles
changes: Cron دیگر بروزرسانی، سلامت کلاستر، همگام‌سازی منو، مصرف، پرداخت و Processor را در یک Invocation اجرا نمی‌کند.
برای تلگرام یک Relay داخلی و امن در Processor اضافه شد که فقط از Service Binding داخلی Core پذیرفته می‌شود.
telegramUiApi در خطای سقف Subrequest به‌جای تکرار شکست در Core، همان درخواست را از Processor ارسال می‌کند.
ارسال اضطراری safeTelegramWebhook نیز از مسیر Relay پشتیبانی می‌کند.
تعداد آیتم‌های پردازش هر فاز کاهش یافت تا روی پلن Free نیز حاشیه امن باقی بماند.

deployment.automatic_provisioning: upload ZIP through the central bot
deployment.automatic_migration: no new D1 table, column or manual SQL is required
required_bindings: Core: PASARGUARD_DB, EDGE_WORKER, PROCESSOR_WORKER and LIVE_USAGE_COORDINATOR

validation.worker_syntax: passed: node --check for core, edge and processor
validation.cron_isolation: passed: eight mutually exclusive Core maintenance phases; automatic update, activation, health, provider sync, usage, payments, helper and Processor trigger no longer share one invocation
validation.telegram_relay: passed by static contract: Core retries subrequest-limit Telegram calls through the internal Processor service endpoint
validation.relay_security: passed by static contract: internal hostname and exact service-hop header required; token and method are validated and not logged
validation.batch_budget: passed: reseller menu 2, manager sync 1, report flush 2 and payment/trial batches reduced
validation.zip_integrity: passed: clean nine-entry archive structure and CRC validation
validation.live_api: not run; requires production Cloudflare and Telegram credentials

limitations: The Processor relay requires the existing PROCESSOR_WORKER binding on Core.
If Cloudflare blocks every invocation or the Processor is unavailable at the same time, Telegram delivery cannot be recovered by the affected cluster.
Production delivery must be confirmed after deployment with real Cloudflare and Telegram credentials.
